name: koishi-plugin-elysia-ai-model-gateway
description: Elysia A.I. model gateway Koishi plugin.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.rmSync('lib',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=lib/index.cjs --external:koishi --external:@elysia-ai/core --external:@elysia-ai/shared && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=lib/index.mjs --external:koishi --external:@elysia-ai/core --external:@elysia-ai/shared

author: PinkElysiaDev

koishi.description: Elysia A.I. model gateway Koishi plugin.
